channel.title: 博客 on Mackenia 的小站
channel.description: Recent content in 博客 on Mackenia 的小站

item.title: 一言收藏
item.description: @font-face { font-family: ‘csWb’; src: url(“https://mackenia.xyz/陈尚文标准钢笔行书.ttf”); } @font-face { font-family: 'dkJs'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/雕刻旧时光.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'rmJz'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/瑞美加张清平硬笔行书.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'myJc'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa梅雨煎茶.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'xhWl'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa星河万里请指教.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'yhHr'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa银河绘日云月呢喃.ttf"); } #hitokoto { position: relative; } .left { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; } .word { font-size: 2.3rem; text-align: center; line-height: 50px; word-break: normal; margin: 0; padding: 15px 50px; font-family: 'rmJz'; } .

item.title: 图片API
item.description: 图片接口 注意! 直接点击将会跳转到原作者的博客或者发布地址 带二次元属性 Unisho(不局限于图片): https://api.yimian.xyz/img 保罗(不局限于图片): https://api.paugram.com/wallpaper Paulzzh(东方Project相关): https://img.paulzzh.tech/touhou/random 岁月小筑: https://img.xjh.me/random_img.php 墨天逸: https://api.mtyqx.cn/tapi/random.php 夏沫博客: https://cdn.seovx.com 晓晴博客: https://acg.toubiec.cn/random.php 免费随机图片: https://tuapi.eees.cc/api.php CSDN 超级小兔: https://imgapi.xl0408.top/index.php 小歪: https://api.ixiaowai.cn/api/api.php 木子博客: https://api.mz-moe.cn/img.php 樱花: https://www.dmoe.cc/random.php 韩小伟: https://api.vvhan.com/api/acgimg 不带二次元属性 Lorem Picsum: https://picsum.photos/200/300 Unsplash: 调用较复杂, 且需要注册账号

item.title: Init
item.description: 博客成立了 有请歌姬为大家献唱一首：
